title: Midnight Zahtar Snapper
description: A nutty and flaky midnight-craving Turkish dish featuring roasted red snapper with a mix of spices that includes zahtar.
instructions: Preheat your oven to 400°F (200°C). Pat dry the red snapper fillets with paper towels.
In a small bowl, mix olive oil, minced garlic, zahtar seasoning, lemon juice, salt, and pepper. Brush this mixture evenly over both sides of the snapper fillets.
Place the seasoned snapper fillets on a baking sheet lined with aluminum foil or parchment paper.

Roast in the preheated oven for 12-15 minutes, or until the internal temperature reaches 145°F (63°C) and the fish is opaque but still slightly firm to the touch. Use an instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part of the fillet for accuracy.
Remove from the oven and let it rest for a few minutes before serving with fresh chopped parsley as garnish if desired.
Garnish each plate with a sprinkle of zahtar spice blend for added flavor.
